message:
test(fcp-core): pin EnrollmentStatus 5-variant serde + predicate truth tables (flywheel_connectors-nn11p)

Bead asks for ZoneTransition state machine + serde pinning. No type
literally named ZoneTransition exists in fcp-core; the closest analogue
with state-machine semantics over zone membership is EnrollmentStatus
at enrollment.rs:920. Device enrollment IS the admission-into-zone
transition; the 5 variants form the lifecycle vocabulary
(Pending/Approved/Rejected/Revoked/Expired).

LifecycleState (registry_sync_state_machine.rs) and CheckpointAdvanceState
(checkpoint_golden_vectors.rs) are already pinned. EnrollmentStatus's
wire form, Display per variant, predicate truth tables, and
terminal-vs-transient partition are residual unpinned territory —
existing enrollment_golden_vectors.rs only generates CBOR vector
fixtures, not per-variant pinning.

Coverage: 5-variant snake_case serde rename matrix, Display matches
serde wire form per variant, is_enrolled exhaustive truth table (only
Approved → true), is_renewable exhaustive truth table (Approved +
Expired only), terminal-state contract for Rejected + Revoked (neither
enrolled nor renewable), Approved as unique fixed-point of
(is_enrolled ∧ is_renewable), CBOR Text-scalar shape, PascalCase
rejection sentinel, distinct-JSON sentinel, HashMap key behavior,
implied terminality partition consistency.

12 tests green via CARGO_TARGET_DIR=/tmp/fcp-p1-nn11p cargo test -p
fcp-core --test zone_transition_state_machine.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
